[ST+99]  Real-time Bounding Box Area Computation

Schmalstieg.tech99 (Technical report)
Author(s)Schmalstieg, Dieter and Tobler, Robert F.
Title« Real-time Bounding Box Area Computation »
NumberTR-186-2-99-05
InstitutionInstitute of Computer Graphics and Algorithms, Vienna University of Technology
Year1999
AddressFavoritenstrasse 9-11/186, A-1040 Vienna, Austria

Abstract & Keywords
The area covered by a 3D bounding box after projection onto the screen is relevant for view-dependent algorithms in real-time and photorealistic rendering. We describe a fast method to compute the accurate 2D area of a 3D oriented bounding box, and show how it can be computed equally fast or faster than its approximation with a 2D bounding box enclosing the projected 3D bounding box.

Keywords: view-dependent algorithms applications, level of detail, bounding box area, computer graphics
